executives.name: Kavitha Mariappan
executives.background: Kavitha Mariappan has been a director since 2022. She is the Executive Vice President, Customer Experience and Transformation at Zscaler, Inc.

executives.name: Mark McLaughlin
executives.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Palo Alto Networks. Former CEO of Verisign.

executives.name: Yvonne Wassenaar
executives.background: Former CEO of Puppet. Former executive at Airware, New Relic, and VMware. Director at Forrester Research and JFrog.
